# Vendor Analytics

## Overview
Analytics dan insights untuk vendor.

## File Location
- `src/pages/vendor/Analytics.tsx` - Halaman analytics
- `src/components/vendor/SalesAnalytics.tsx` - Sales
- `src/components/vendor/CustomerInsights.tsx` - Insights

## Database Tables
- `orders` - Sales data
- `products` - Product data
- `maintenance_reviews` - Reviews

## Features
- ✅ Sales analytics
- ✅ Product performance
- ✅ Customer insights
- ✅ Revenue charts
- ✅ Order trends
- ✅ Rating overview

## Implementation Status
| Feature | Status |
|---------|--------|
| Sales | ✅ Complete |
| Products | ✅ Complete |
| Insights | ✅ Complete |
| Charts | ✅ Complete |

## Metrics
- Total Revenue
- Order Count
- Average Order Value
- Product Rankings
- Customer Retention

## Related Components
- `SalesAnalytics`
- `CustomerInsights`
